headline: PayPal (PYPL) Joins Fintech Push To Disrupt Illegal Wildlife Trade Funding
summary: PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL) has joined major fintech, technology and blockchain firms in pledging to combat illicit financial flows linked to the illegal wildlife trade. The pledge focuses on identifying, disrupting and preventing financial channels that enable wildlife trafficking activities. This move places PayPal alongside other global platforms working with regulators and conservation groups to address financial crimes tied to biodiversity loss. For investors following PayPal...
